title: Force focusing visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Force_Focusing_Visor.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Bao-Dur]] wearing a Force focusing visor]]
A visor of mysterious origin, a '''Force focusing visor''' helped clear the user's mind of distractions through unknown means. When used by [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]], it was extremely helpful in channeling [[The Force/Legends|Force]] energy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
